title: World Bank May Mobilise $100 Billion For Nations Hit By Middle East War: Ajay Banga
summary_full: World Bank may mobilise $80-$100 billion in 15 months for war-affected countries, says Ajay Banga.
summary_public: World Bank may mobilise $80-$100 billion in 15 months for war-affected countries, says Ajay Banga.
